metcon.name: Warm up
metcon.description:
1:00 Row / Ski / Bike
10 Glute bridges
10 KB deadlifts
10 Ring rows
8 Ab-mat sit-ups
2–3 rope J-hook holds each
2–3 standing rope pulls each
1 easy rope climb or partial climb each
With light KBs:
6 double KB deadlifts
6 double KB cleans
6 double KB push press
4 double KB clean & jerks
Primer
4 double KB C&J @ workout weight
4 weighted step-ups @ workout weightI’m

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, quads, and lower back via C&Js and step-ups; accessory work targets pulling muscles and posterior chain balance.

raw_text:
Rainy day | 35 min AMRAP
40/32 cal Row / Ski
4 Rope Climbs
20 Double KB Clean & Jerks @ 24/16kg
30 Weighted Step-ups @ 2 x 22.5/15kg
40 ab-mat Sit-ups
Warm up | 1:00 Row / Ski / Bike
10 Glute bridges
10 KB deadlifts
10 Ring rows
8 Ab-mat sit-ups
2–3 rope J-hook holds each
2–3 standing rope pulls each
1 easy rope climb or partial climb each
With light KBs:
6 double KB deadlifts
6 double KB cleans
6 double KB push press
4 double KB clean & jerks
Primer
4 double KB C&J @ workout weight
4 weighted step-ups @ workout weightI’m
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Warm up. Workout: 1:00 Row / Ski / Bike, 10 Glute bridges, 10 KB deadlifts, 10 Ring rows, 8 Ab-mat sit-ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/rear delts), biceps, hamstrings.
